description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: E, F, Mas Mob

Make a single attack with your held weapon. If the attack hits, it deals 1d6 bonus damage. A Samurai with at least 6 class levels may substitute this technique for a normal attack when they make a Full Attack (using the same attack bonus as the substituted attack), but only if they chose the Kenjutsu path. If you substitute the technique this way, it cannot be empowered and the Perform Requirements are automatically met.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the bonus damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per 2 levels or 6d6 total.

Mastery: On hit, you may choose to deal no immediate damage. Instead, the damage is dealt up to a number of rounds later (based on mastery level). If the damage would reduce the target to -1 hp when you hit and choose to delay, the target is paralyzed until it takes damage from any source. Step 1: One round, Step 3: Two rounds, Step 5: Three rounds.
